name: PanelPopulatorConfigurator
description: Create a PanelPopulator from a panel and a list of agents.

inputParameters.name: agents
inputParameters.description: List of PopulatorAgents to assign to this panel.

inputParameters.name: default_feature_configs
inputParameters.description: List of default feature agent prototypes, keyed by feature type.

inputParameters.name: joint_rule_overrides
inputParameters.description: List of CategoryRule overrides routed automatically to the agent(s) that own each rule's categories.
